title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 7: Knowledge of the Absolute
description: Chapter 7 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals that all of existence is strung on him like pearls on a thread.
introduction: Chapter 7 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals that all of existence is strung on him like pearls on a thread.

translation.text: I am the taste of water, the light of the sun and moon, the syllable Om, the sound in ether, and the ability in man.
